when: Saturday mornings - Orchestra 9:30-11:30 am, Ensemble 9:30-10:00 am

instrument_hire: There are a limited number of instruments available for hire, including small and full size violins & cellos - contact us for more information (gallerymusiccentre@gmail.com).

groups.name: Ensemble
